person.headline: VP, HR & Business Operations at Maximizer

company.name: Maximizer
company.description: Maximizer is a trusted Canadian CRM platform built to help financial services and sales professionals grow relationships, drive results, and stay ahead of the curve. Used by more than 120,000 global customers, Maximizer is designed for fast deployment, powerful customization, and everyday usability. AI-assisted summaries and real-time exception alerts give users timely insights that go beyond traditional reporting—helping teams identify risks, act on opportunities, and make smarter decisions. Whether managing a growing pipeline or building a book of business, Maximizer equips professionals with the visibility and tools to stay organized, compliant, and prepared for what’s next.
company.description_seo: Discover the ultimate CRM solutions tailored for small businesses & teams in Canada. Drive sales performance with seamless customer relationship management.
company.description_ai: Maximizer CRM is a company that provides CRM solutions tailored for small businesses and teams in Canada. They offer a range of products and services including sales leader edition, financial advisor edition, and sales leader edition. Their solutions help businesses optimize sales performance, streamline workflows, and engage more prospects. Maximizer CRM aims to help businesses grow, retain customers, and effectively connect with their clients.

location.raw_address: 60 Smithe St, Suite 260, Vancouver, British Columbia V6B 0P5, CA
